Configure and run every workflow from one dashboard — tune RL rewards, trainers, PyTorch settings, sweeps, multiseed, CUDA install, and environment options.

Interactive chat & continuous RL

Pick a Hugging Face GGUF route or local model, download if needed, then train via llama.cpp or the simulator. Chat tasks queue to outputs/chat_tasks.jsonl.
